creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text: My Understanding is that bin/{rdoc,ri} of lang/ruby26 don't work without devel/rubygem-rdoc. So moving them from lang/ruby26 to devel/rubygem-rdoc shouldn't affect to build of depending ports. But lang/ruby26 is current default version of Ruby. So just to make sure I would like to request exp-run with combination of bug #241556 and this bug report.
